title: Crunchy Spicy Thai Ginger Stir-fry
description: A sweet and spicy Thai ginger stir-fry with a touch of creaminess made from whole30-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons butter
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's unsalted if dietary restrictions apply.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of water to create a slurry.
Heat butter in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and ginger; stir-fry until fragrant and slightly browned.
Pour coconut milk into the pan while stirring continuously for about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low and add soy sauce, lite coconut cream, and cornstarch slurry mixture.
Cook for another 10 minutes or until thickened. Stir in sesame seeds if using.

axes.descriptor: Spicy Crunchy Whole30 Butter Slow Cook
